display.name: Half-Spent Campfire
display.short_description: A campfire has collapsed into wet ash beside the road. One ration sack still smokes at the edge of the coals, and somebody scratched route marks into the blackened stones.

choices.label: Wake the coals and eat
choices.summary: Blow the ash alive just long enough to warm the stubborn ration scrap still sealed in the soot.

choices.label: Read the soot-marked stones
choices.summary: Trace the half-burned route marks until the road's next bad turn makes sense to you.
